entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet plants characterized by systemic symptoms

entities.name: RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to develop symptomless shoots after showing systemic symptoms of downy mildew

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to increase the levels of recovery resistance under high disease pressure

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where the resistance of lines produced from recovered plants was tested and maintained

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country where the recovery phenomenon in pearl millet was observed

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country where the recovery phenomenon in pearl millet was observed

entities.name: DEFENSE MECHANISM
entities.description: The biological process by which recovery resistance provides durable resistance to downy mildew
